items.title: What's New This Tax Season That Can Save You Money
items.description: There are some new wrinkles, especially for those who sell things online or bought an EV.

items.title: Natural-Gas Firm Diversified Energy Strikes Deal for Permian Basin Player
items.description: Maverick Natural Resources has operations in Texas and Oklahoma.

items.title: Building-Products Distributor QXO Launches Hostile Bid for Beacon
items.description: QXO is taking its offer directly to shareholders after being rebuffed on several occasions.

items.title: Natural Gas Falls on Shifting Weather Forecasts
items.description: U.S. natural gas futures fell after weekend updates took some of the chill out of early February weather forecasts.

items.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
items.description: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.
